fx_margin_compression.description: Pricing war on transfer rails: Wise-level transparent pricing forces our net take to 40% of plan (EV-2026-W28-013 contradictory evidence: cheap rails already exist).

own_rail_failure.description: EV-2026-W28-018 materialises at business scale: BOTIM's own transfer execution fails (12-day delays, no-refund loops); merchants route away and support load spikes.

transit_and_invoice_fraud.description: Goods never ship / collusive supplier invoicing: financed payments to fake or failing suppliers. ECL 2.5x, fraud 2x.

funded_competitor_capture.description: IP-2026-002: CredibleX/Comfi deploy their capital into the same importers first; our CAC quadruples and routed share erodes.

compliance_throttle.description: EV-2026-W28-019-style corporate-compliance loops throttle cross-border volume and add manual review cost.
